content: Mid-2026: Deepgram Flux (conversational STT with model-integrated end-of-turn detection, median EOT <300ms) is now the voice-agent default recommendation; Nova-3 remains current flagship for transcription and is fully supported. ElevenLabs Flash v2.5 (~75ms) remains the real-time voice-agent TTS default (their Agents Platform default); Eleven v3 is expressive but NOT real-time.
